# 一：题目类型
模运算；
# 二：题目
```Python
from Crypto.Util.number import *
from enc import flag

m = bytes_to_long(flag)
p = getPrime(512)
q = getPrime(512)
r = getPrime(777)
t = getPrime(777)
tmp = getPrime(15)
e = 65537
n = p*q
print(f"c = {pow(m,e,n)}")
print(f"leak = {p*r-q*t-tmp}")
print(f"r = {r}")
print(f"t = {t}")
'''
c = 
leak = -
r = 540773656780250106685561393420542365437343004299064146262342543752067082912568448023635943031970822761553359007866271641813716724638227747472708338961980919732175963027831802009045054279512279600479990055324334409624906638246279224179
t = 769731537380235264531777064059328028797497864746633212240122116751087477575199072104672348679665473015121931258241559925343318612405487787147202269622930952928453601927748231607829964659315008473040129653829070355104889013797299454683
'''
```
# 三：解题思路与代码
### 方法一：
**[图片缺失: Pasted image 20241009224829.png]**
tmp 不⼤，可以直接爆破，然后⽤扩展欧⼏⾥得求解素数的丢番图⽅程即可，注意⼀下解的正负即可。

# 四：感悟
